name: ship-kit
description: Portable ship → babysit PR pipeline. /ship chains simplify → verify → code-review → smart-commit → branch hygiene → PR → babysit → reflect. Bundles its own simplify/verify/code-review skills so it is self-contained on any harness (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Hermes, OpenClaw). /babysit drives a PR to APPROVED + CI-green + mergeable; /smart-commit clusters conventional commits; /reflect captures session lessons.
